_doc: Canonical ICCSE2026 ARCD evaluation results. Authoritative source for any 'paper number' cited in LAB_ARCD_INTEGERATE (CHANGELOG, docs, agent prompts, regression tests). Numbers are imported verbatim from the ARCD_AGENT companion repo's post-fix (gcnfix2) screening campaign and the LF-PCO LLM-judge v2 calibration. LAB does NOT reproduce these locally — paper checkpoints are d_model=128, ~5-7M params; LAB production is d=2048, ~170M params, 423 skills, 5-stage V/R-aware. The 5-epoch smoke retrain run by this branch only verifies state-dict compatibility, NOT paper-grade accuracy.
paper: Khajiev, R. et al. ARCD: Attentive Relational Cognitive Diagnosis with V/R-aware GCN over Multi-Relational Knowledge Graphs. ICCSE 2026 (under review).

synthetic.description: V/R-aware synthetic corpus with 423 skills, 5-stage GCN+temporal+decay+relational-decay ablations enabled

xes3g5m.description: Public XES3G5M math knowledge tracing benchmark; ARCD compared against simpleKT, Q-KT, RCD, DisenGCD, GKT-CD

learning_fellow_pco_calibration.description: Cohen's kappa between rule-based PCODetector and DeepSeek-v3.2 LLM judge over 500 synthetic learner sessions across 6 archetypes (background, predictive_only, clean_pco, borderline_mastery, decoy, stale_skill)

lab_local_smoke_calibration.description: Local 5-session dry-run of the same calibrator inside LAB_ARCD_INTEGERATE — used to verify the calibrate_pco_with_llm.py CLI works in this repo, NOT to reproduce the paper's kappa. The 0.902 figure stays canonical.
